file_contents./root/emergency_restore.sh:
#!/bin/bash
# EMERGENCY DB RESTORE - contact DBA team first!
set -e
BACKUP_FILE="$1"
if [ -z "$BACKUP_FILE" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <backup_file.sql.gz>"
    exit 1
fi
systemctl stop pgbouncer
PGPASSWORD='P0stgr3s_Sup3r_S3cret!' dropdb -U postgres app_production
PGPASSWORD='P0stgr3s_Sup3r_S3cret!' createdb -U postgres app_production
gunzip -c $BACKUP_FILE | PGPASSWORD='P0stgr3s_Sup3r_S3cret!' psql -U postgres app_production
systemctl start pgbouncer
echo "Restore complete. Verify data integrity!"
file_contents./home/dba/scripts/full_backup.sh:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
BACKUP_DIR=/var/backups/pg
DATE=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)
FILENAME="daily_${DATE}.sql.gz"

export PGPASSWORD='P0stgr3s_Sup3r_S3cret!'
pg_dumpall -U postgres | gzip > ${BACKUP_DIR}/${FILENAME}

# Upload to S3
aws s3 cp ${BACKUP_DIR}/${FILENAME} s3://corp-db-backups/pg-primary/${FILENAME}

# Replicate to standby
scp ${BACKUP_DIR}/${FILENAME} dba@db-standby.internal.corp:/var/backups/pg/

# Cleanup old backups (keep 14 days)
find ${BACKUP_DIR} -name 'daily_*.sql.gz' -mtime +14 -delete

echo "Backup complete: ${FILENAME}"

file_contents./home/dba/scripts/replicate_to_standby.s:
#!/bin/bash
# Replicate WAL archives and base backup to standby server
set -e

STANDBY_HOST="db-standby.internal.corp"
STANDBY_USER="dba"
DATA_DIR="/var/lib/pgsql/14/data"
WAL_DIR="${DATA_DIR}/pg_wal"
BACKUP_DIR="/var/backups/pg"

echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') - Starting replication sync to ${STANDBY_HOST}"

# Archive current WAL segments
/usr/pgsql-14/bin/pg_basebackup -h localhost -U replicator -D /tmp/pg_basebackup_tmp -Fp -Xs -P 2>/dev/null

# Sync WAL archives
rsync -avz --delete ${WAL_DIR}/ ${STANDBY_USER}@${STANDBY_HOST}:${WAL_DIR}/

# Sync latest backup
LATEST=$(ls -t ${BACKUP_DIR}/daily_*.sql.gz | head -1)
if [ -n "$LATEST" ]; then
    scp "$LATEST" ${STANDBY_USER}@${STANDBY_HOST}:${BACKUP_DIR}/
fi

rm -rf /tmp/pg_basebackup_tmp
echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') - Replication sync complete"

[databases]
app_production = host=127.0.0.1 port=5432 dbname=app_production
monitoring = host=127.0.0.1 port=5432 dbname=monitoring

[pgbouncer]
listen_addr = *
listen_port = 6432
auth_type = md5
auth_file = /etc/pgbouncer/userlist.txt
pool_mode = transaction
max_client_conn = 200
default_pool_size = 25
min_pool_size = 5
reserve_pool_size = 5
reserve_pool_timeout = 3
server_lifetime = 3600
server_idle_timeout = 600
log_connections = 1
log_disconnections = 1
log_pooler_errors = 1
admin_users = postgres
stats_users = nagios_check
pidfile = /var/run/pgbouncer/pgbouncer.pid
logfile = /var/log/pgbouncer/pgbouncer.log

file_contents./home/dba/.bashrc:
# .bashrc

# Source global definitions
if [ -f /etc/bashrc ]; then
	. /etc/bashrc
fi

alias rm='rm -i'
alias cp='cp -i'
alias mv='mv -i'

# PostgreSQL shortcuts
alias pg='sudo -u postgres psql'
alias pgstat='psql -c "SELECT datname, numbackends, xact_commit, xact_rollback FROM pg_stat_database;"'
alias pgrepl='psql -c "SELECT * FROM pg_stat_replication;"'
alias pgsize='psql -c "SELECT datname, pg_size_pretty(pg_database_size(datname)) FROM pg_database ORDER BY pg_database_size(datname) DESC;"'
alias pglog='sudo tail -f /var/lib/pgsql/14/data/log/postgresql-*.log'

export PATH="/usr/pgsql-14/bin:$PATH"
export PGDATA=/var/lib/pgsql/14/data
export EDITOR=vim

PS1='[\u@\h \W]\$ '

file_contents./var/lib/pgsql/14/data/postgresql.conf:
# PostgreSQL configuration file
# ----------------------------
#
# This file consists of lines of the form:
#   name = value

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# FILE LOCATIONS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

data_directory = '/var/lib/pgsql/14/data'
hba_file = '/var/lib/pgsql/14/data/pg_hba.conf'
ident_file = '/var/lib/pgsql/14/data/pg_ident.conf'

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CONNECTIONS AND AUTHENTICATION
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

listen_addresses = '*'
port = 5432
max_connections = 200
superuser_reserved_connections = 3

# - Authentication -
authentication_timeout = 1min
password_encryption = scram-sha-256

# - SSL -
ssl = on
ssl_cert_file = 'server.crt'
ssl_key_file = 'server.key'

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# RESOURCE USAGE
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

shared_buffers = 2GB
huge_pages = try
temp_buffers = 32MB
work_mem = 64MB
maintenance_work_mem = 512MB
effective_cache_size = 6GB

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# WRITE AHEAD LOG
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

wal_level = replica
max_wal_senders = 5
max_replication_slots = 5
wal_keep_size = 1GB
archive_mode = on
archive_command = 'cp %p /var/lib/pgsql/14/data/pg_wal_archive/%f'

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# REPLICATION
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

hot_standby = on
hot_standby_feedback = on

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# QUERY TUNING
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

random_page_cost = 1.1
effective_io_concurrency = 200

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# LOGGING
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

logging_collector = on
log_directory = 'log'
log_filename = 'postgresql-%a.log'
log_rotation_age = 1d
log_rotation_size = 0
log_min_duration_statement = 1000
log_checkpoints = on
log_connections = on
log_disconnections = on
log_lock_waits = on
log_line_prefix = '%m [%p] %q%u@%d '
log_timezone = 'America/Chicago'

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# AUTOVACUUM
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

autovacuum = on
autovacuum_max_workers = 3
autovacuum_naptime = 1min
autovacuum_vacuum_threshold = 50
autovacuum_analyze_threshold = 50

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CLIENT CONNECTION DEFAULTS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

timezone = 'America/Chicago'
lc_messages = 'en_US.UTF-8'
lc_monetary = 'en_US.UTF-8'
lc_numeric = 'en_US.UTF-8'
lc_time = 'en_US.UTF-8'
default_text_search_config = 'pg_catalog.english'
